description: Out-of-scope request — agent must refuse politely
persona: Random user asking a general career advice question unrelated to SHL assessments.

turns.content: Can you write me a cover letter for a data scientist job?

I'm specialised in recommending SHL psychometric assessments for hiring teams. I'm not able to help with cover letters, but I'd be happy to suggest assessments if you're hiring for a data science role!
